title: Pengin's LOTC Pack
description: A select choice of mods ideal for use on Lord of the Craft. Heavy bias from 248pengin in the mod selection.
body:
A handful of client-sided mods useful for immersion and convenience on the server Lord of the Craft. Comes with several default settings, such as the disabling of Xaero's entity radar and cave mode. It's recommended to alter settings and keybinds to your preference after downloading.

Comes with a few QoL texturepacks pre-installed, although does not come with any default shaders.
